en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.
I can lend you.
A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.
B: I don’t have one either, let’s go buy one.
A: Let’s go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: hang, a micakay henay tu sabulic.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.
A: Let’s go buy breakfast, shall we?

ab: haycan, na malanamay tu kaku i luma’.
en: B: No, I’ve already eaten at home.
A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.
B: Hurry up and heat it up!
A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: mahiza/mahida sa pulung han ita mukan ku tabu.
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧！
en: B: Then let’s eat my lunch box together!
A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ab: i cacudadan kaku mukan tu asu’ay a sakalahuk.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.
A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ab: sitabu kaku ayza a demiad, mapulung kita malahuk!
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧！
en: B: I’ve brought a lunchbox today, let’s eat together at noon!

ab: tayza kita mimali kapah tu haw?
en: A: Let’s go play basketball, shall we?
B: Oh good! Let’s go.

ab: tayza kita mipangciw kapah tu haw?
en: A: Let’s go play baseball, shall we?
B: No, I want to study.

ab: na padangen kaku miala tu saasik.
en: A: Please help me with the broom.
B: Okay, here’s a broomstick for you.

ab: pataduen kaku miala tu dawa kapah tu haw?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: miasik kaku, kau ci Tubah ku miedapay tisuwanan muala.
en: B: I’m sweeping the floor, you ask Tubah to carry it for you.
A: Are you done sweeping?
B: I swept it.
A: Why don’t you clean up?
B: I’ve finished cleaning up.
A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.
B: Okay, I’ll go get the cloth.

ab: mauning kuyza a sasingalan, katayza misipu.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: sawni tu, caay henay kaasik aku ku i tiniay.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I’m not done sweeping here yet.
A: What are you going to do later?
B: I’m going to see my teacher.
A: What do you do after school?

ab: a miladay kaku tu cabay tayza mudadiw.
en: B: I’m going to sing with my friends.
A: What does he do after school?
B: He’s going swimming.
